io.vertx.mutiny.mqtt.MqttClient

Package
Description
io.vertx.mutiny.mqtt
 

  • Uses of MqttClient in io.vertx.mutiny.mqtt

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final TypeArg<MqttClient>
    MqttClient.__TYPE_ARG
     
    Methods in io.vertx.mutiny.mqtt that return MqttClient
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.authenticationExchangeAndForget(io.vertx.mqtt.messages.codes.MqttAuthenticateReasonCode reasonCode, io.netty.handler.codec.mqtt.MqttProperties properties)
    Send an AUTH packet to the server.
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.authenticationExchangeHandler(Consumer<MqttAuthenticationExchangeMessage> handler)
    Sets a handler that will be called when the server sends an AUTH packet (MQTT 5.0 Enhanced Authentication, see §3.15).
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.closeHandler(Runnable closeHandler)
    Set a handler that will be called when the connection with server is closed
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.connectAndForget(int port, String host)
    Connects to an MQTT server calling connectHandler after connection
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.connectAndForget(int port, String host, String serverName)
    Connects to an MQTT server calling connectHandler after connection
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.connectAndForget(int port, String host, String serverName, Map<String,String> userProperties)
    Connects to an MQTT server calling connectHandler after connection
    static MqttClient
    MqttClient.create(Vertx vertx)
    Return an MQTT client instance using the default options
    static MqttClient
    MqttClient.create(Vertx vertx, io.vertx.mqtt.MqttClientOptions options)
    Return an MQTT client instance
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.disconnectAndForget()
    Disconnects from the MQTT server
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.disconnectMessageHandler(Consumer<MqttDisconnectMessage> handler)
    Sets a handler that will be called when the server sends a DISCONNECT packet.
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.exceptionHandler(Consumer<Throwable> handler)
    Set an exception handler for the client, that will be called when an error happens in internal netty structures.
    static MqttClient
    MqttClient.newInstance(io.vertx.mqtt.MqttClient delegate)
    Creates a new instance of the MqttClient.
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.ping()
    This method is needed by the client in order to avoid server closes the connection due to the keep alive timeout if client has no messages to send
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.pingResponseHandler(Runnable pingResponseHandler)
    Sets handler which will be called after PINGRESP packet receiving
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.publishAckMessageHandler(Consumer<MqttPubAckMessage> handler)
    Sets a handler which will be called each time a PUBACK is received from the server.
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.publishAndForget(int id, String topic, io.vertx.core.buffer.Buffer payload, io.netty.handler.codec.mqtt.MqttQoS qosLevel, boolean isDup, boolean isRetain)
    Sends the PUBLISH message to the remote MQTT server with a specific message ID
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.publishAndForget(String topic, io.vertx.core.buffer.Buffer payload, io.netty.handler.codec.mqtt.MqttQoS qosLevel, boolean isDup, boolean isRetain)
    Sends the PUBLISH message to the remote MQTT server
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.publishCompletionExpirationHandler(Consumer<Integer> publishCompletionExpirationHandler)
    Sets a handler which will be called when the client does not receive a PUBACK or PUBREC/PUBCOMP for a message published using QoS 1 or 2 respectively.
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.publishCompletionHandler(Consumer<Integer> publishCompletionHandler)
    Sets a handler which will be called each time the publishing of a message has been completed.
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.publishCompletionUnknownPacketIdHandler(Consumer<Integer> publishCompletionPhantomHandler)
    Sets a handler which will be called when the client receives a PUBACK/PUBREC/PUBCOMP with an unknown packet ID.
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.publishCompMessageHandler(Consumer<MqttPubCompMessage> handler)
    Sets a handler which will be called each time a PUBCOMP is received from the server.
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.publishHandler(Consumer<MqttPublishMessage> publishHandler)
    Sets handler which will be called each time server publish something to client
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.publishRecMessageHandler(Consumer<MqttPubRecMessage> handler)
    Sets a handler which will be called each time a PUBREC is received from the server.
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.publishReleaseAndForget(int publishMessageId)
    Sends the PUBREL message to the remote MQTT server.
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.subscribeAndForget(String topic, int qos)
    Subscribes to the topic with a specified QoS level
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.subscribeAndForget(Map<String,Integer> topics)
    Subscribes to the topics with related QoS levels
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.subscribeCompletionHandler(Consumer<MqttSubAckMessage> subscribeCompletionHandler)
    Sets handler which will be called after SUBACK packet receiving
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.unsubscribeAndForget(String topic)
    Unsubscribe from receiving messages on given topic
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.unsubscribeAndForget(List<String> topics)
    Unsubscribe from receiving messages on given list of topic
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.unsubscribeCompletionHandler(Consumer<Integer> unsubscribeCompletionHandler)
    Sets handler which will be called after UNSUBACK packet receiving
    MqttClient
    MqttClient.unsubscribeCompletionMessageHandler(Consumer<MqttUnsubAckMessage> unsubscribeCompletionMessageHandler)
    Sets handler which will be called after UNSUBACK packet receiving
